controls.title: Pre-Engagement Interactions
controls.text: Establish the scope, rules of engagement, legal authorisation, testing windows, emergency contacts, and escalation procedures before any testing begins. Obtain written authorisation from the asset owner.
controls.evidence_expectation: Signed scope document; rules of engagement; written authorisation letter; emergency contact list; testing window confirmation
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify scope document signed by authorised representative; confirm rules of engagement define off-limits actions; verify emergency escalation procedure established; confirm testing window agreed

controls.title: Intelligence Gathering (OSINT and Active Recon)
controls.text: Collect information about the target using passive (OSINT) and active techniques: DNS enumeration, WHOIS, Shodan/Censys, certificate transparency, BGP routing, social engineering intelligence, and network scanning.
controls.evidence_expectation: OSINT report; DNS enumeration output; Shodan/Censys results; network scan output (nmap); certificate transparency results
controls.assessment_procedure: Document all OSINT sources used; verify passive recon conducted before active; compare scope against discovered assets; identify shadow IT and forgotten subdomains

controls.title: Threat Modelling
controls.text: Identify the most likely threat actors, their capabilities, and motivations. Map threats to the target's business context to prioritise testing focus on the most impactful attack paths.
controls.evidence_expectation: Threat model document; STRIDE/DREAD or PASTA threat model output; threat actor profile; prioritised attack surface
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify threat model created before active testing; confirm threats mapped to business impact; check prioritisation aligns with client's risk profile

controls.title: Vulnerability Research and Analysis
controls.text: Identify vulnerabilities in the target through automated scanning, manual analysis, and CVE research. Correlate discovered technologies with known vulnerability databases (NVD, CVE, Exploit-DB).
controls.evidence_expectation: Vulnerability scan output (Nessus, OpenVAS, Nuclei); CVE correlation report; manual analysis notes; false positive verification
controls.assessment_procedure: Run authenticated and unauthenticated scans; manually verify identified vulnerabilities; check CVE databases for discovered software versions; prioritise by CVSS score and exploitability

controls.title: Exploitation
controls.text: Attempt to exploit identified vulnerabilities within the agreed rules of engagement to demonstrate real-world impact, achieve proof-of-concept, and establish the exploitability and severity of findings.
controls.evidence_expectation: Exploitation proof-of-concept; screenshots of successful exploitation; reverse shell or privilege escalation evidence; impact demonstration (data accessed, services affected)
controls.assessment_procedure: Only exploit within agreed scope and rules; document all exploitation attempts (success and failure); demonstrate minimum viable proof without causing service disruption; document post-exploitation impact

controls.title: Post Exploitation and Lateral Movement
controls.text: After initial compromise, assess the attacker's ability to maintain persistence, escalate privileges, move laterally within the network, and exfiltrate data to demonstrate chained attack impact.
controls.evidence_expectation: Lateral movement evidence; privilege escalation proof; persistence mechanism discovered; data exfiltration path demonstrated (without actual exfiltration)
controls.assessment_procedure: Test for credential harvesting from initial foothold; attempt lateral movement to adjacent systems; document privilege escalation paths; map data exfiltration routes; verify network segmentation effectiveness

controls.title: Reporting
controls.text: Produce a structured penetration test report containing an executive summary, technical findings with CVSS scores, reproduction steps, evidence, risk ratings, and actionable remediation recommendations prioritised by business impact.
controls.evidence_expectation: Penetration test report document; executive summary; technical findings with CVSS scores; evidence appendix; remediation roadmap
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify report contains all required sections; confirm CVSS scores calculated correctly; check remediation guidance is specific and actionable; verify executive summary is non-technical and risk-focused
